name: Mocha Moose Cake by William Blaylock
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream to 180°F and hold for 5 minutes.
2. Add the dark unsweetened chocolate, undutched cocoa, and gelatin to the hot cream. Stir until the gelatin is fully dissolved.
3. Cool the mixture to 110°F.
4. Add the yogurt starter and stir gently until well combined (but not enough to solidify the cream).
5. Refrigerate the mixture for 8 hours at a temperature between 70°F and 100°F.
6. Chill for an additional 8 hours before serving.
7. If you are short on time, reheat the mixture to about 80°F, add the brown sugar, and whip until stiff peaks form.
8. Pour into two prepared pie crusts (preferably chocolate).
9. Allow to freeze for at least 1 hour before slicing and serving.
